patch.insert_text: He takes over-the-counter diphenhydramine (Benadryl) 25 mg orally most nights for sleep.
added_claims: Patient takes OTC diphenhydramine 25 mg orally most nights for sleep

reasons: Evidence confirms patient takes 25 mg Benadryl (diphenhydramine) most nights; 'for sleep' is a reasonable inference given context and standard dosing.
This medication is not documented elsewhere; note previously stated 'no medications,' so this adds new (correcting) information rather than duplicating.
Medication/OTC use belongs in the Subjective history section.
